stories.headline: UK prepared to deploy RAF Typhoons to keep strait of Hormuz open after Iran war
stories.summary: Proposal at heart of offer made during a 30-country two-day meeting jointly organised by FranceMiddle East crisis – live updatesBritain is prepared to deploy a squadron of RAF Typhoons based in Qatar to patrol over the strait of Hormuz as part of a multinational mission to keep open the strategic waterway once the Iran war comes to an end.The UK military also offered to deploy mine-hunting drones and specialist divers to help clear the strait min

stories.headline: Navy Secretary John Phelan Is Leaving the Pentagon and the Trump Administration
stories.summary: John Phelan is leaving the Pentagon after months of tension with Pete Hegseth and other Pentagon leaders. The tumult comes as the Navy has been engaged in war with Iran.

stories.headline: Alberta Examines Three Northern Routes for Oil Pipe to Feed Asia
stories.summary:
Bloomberg's Brian Platt joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." Alberta is looking at three options for a new oil pipeline to ship 1 million barrels a day through northern British Columbia, according to people familiar with the matter, as Canadian officials make plans to sharply increase energy exports to Asia.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Looking Past One-Time Shocks Pays Off
stories.summary: Andrzej Skiba, head of BlueBay US fixed income at RBC Global Asset Management, joins Scarlet Fu on "Bloomberg Markets." The firm has assets under management of $650 billion.  (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Taiwan president blames China for forced cancellation of Eswatini trip

stories.summary: With 87% of the vote now counted, Progressive Bulgaria has secured a majority in parliament.
